title: teucrium marum subsp. spinescens
intro: Teucrium marum subsp. spinescens, also known as the spiny marum, is a subspecies of the Teucrium marum plant, a type of shrubby perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Teucrium marum subsp. spinescens include its ability to calm the stomach, alleviate menstrual cramps, and even lower blood pressure, making it a popular choice among herbalists. Herbal preparations of Teucrium marum subsp. spinescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote digestive health and overall well-being.
